## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Smith.ai and GrowthX to discuss website updates and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/zxw4SysmEtCRvVQ5yr-Zy6jkReaphMC4?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Partner pages need rebalancing between AI and Virtual Receptionist offerings](https://fathom.video/share/zxw4SysmEtCRvVQ5yr-Zy6jkReaphMC4?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [Industry pages require tweaks to emphasize North American-based human support](https://fathom.video/share/zxw4SysmEtCRvVQ5yr-Zy6jkReaphMC4?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [New priorities: company type pages, then city pages; case studies deprioritized](https://fathom.video/share/zxw4SysmEtCRvVQ5yr-Zy6jkReaphMC4?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)
  - [Ongoing design firm work for site updates, with potential for internal design resources](https://fathom.video/share/zxw4SysmEtCRvVQ5yr-Zy6jkReaphMC4?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)

## Topics

### Partner Page Updates

  - [Rebalance focus between AI Receptionist (AIR) and Virtual Receptionist (VR) offerings](https://fathom.video/share/zxw4SysmEtCRvVQ5yr-Zy6jkReaphMC4?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [Remove AI-heavy language from client benefits section](https://fathom.video/share/zxw4SysmEtCRvVQ5yr-Zy6jkReaphMC4?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Use homepage pricing tiles for both AIR and VR options](https://fathom.video/share/zxw4SysmEtCRvVQ5yr-Zy6jkReaphMC4?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [Ensure partner pages are hidden from search to avoid SEO issues](https://fathom.video/share/zxw4SysmEtCRvVQ5yr-Zy6jkReaphMC4?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)

### Industry Page Refinements

  - [Add FAQ about North American-based receptionists and their involvement](https://fathom.video/share/zxw4SysmEtCRvVQ5yr-Zy6jkReaphMC4?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [Emphasize Smith.ai as a partner, not just a vendor or workflow component](https://fathom.video/share/zxw4SysmEtCRvVQ5yr-Zy6jkReaphMC4?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
  - [Maintain Oxford comma usage and capitalize product names consistently](https://fathom.video/share/zxw4SysmEtCRvVQ5yr-Zy6jkReaphMC4?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)

### Content Strategy and Tone

  - [Adopt a more conversational, "real" tone in content](https://fathom.video/share/zxw4SysmEtCRvVQ5yr-Zy6jkReaphMC4?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
  - [Focus on Smith.ai as an integrated partner rather than just a service provider](https://fathom.video/share/zxw4SysmEtCRvVQ5yr-Zy6jkReaphMC4?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
  - [Careful word choice for terms like "workflow," "playbook," and "instructions"](https://fathom.video/share/zxw4SysmEtCRvVQ5yr-Zy6jkReaphMC4?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)

### Design and Resource Allocation

  - [Design firm (Aether) working on site-wide updates](https://fathom.video/share/zxw4SysmEtCRvVQ5yr-Zy6jkReaphMC4?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)
  - [Potential to use internal design resources for infographics and call flow designs](https://fathom.video/share/zxw4SysmEtCRvVQ5yr-Zy6jkReaphMC4?tab=summary&timestamp=1212.0)
  - [Raze still an option for certain design needs](https://fathom.video/share/zxw4SysmEtCRvVQ5yr-Zy6jkReaphMC4?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

### Content Prioritization

1.  Partner pages
2.  Referrals
3.  Industry pages
4.  Company type pages (e.g., small, mid-market)
5.  City pages
6.  Case studies (deprioritized for now)

## Next Steps

  - [Update partner page with balanced AIR/VR focus and new pricing section](https://fathom.video/share/zxw4SysmEtCRvVQ5yr-Zy6jkReaphMC4?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [Revise industry page (architects) with new FAQ and emphasis on North American support](https://fathom.video/share/zxw4SysmEtCRvVQ5yr-Zy6jkReaphMC4?tab=summary&timestamp=658.0)
  - [Begin work on company type pages after completing industry pages](https://fathom.video/share/zxw4SysmEtCRvVQ5yr-Zy6jkReaphMC4?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)
  - [Coordinate with Bol for consistent application of modules across the site](https://fathom.video/share/zxw4SysmEtCRvVQ5yr-Zy6jkReaphMC4?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [Review updated partner page once changes are implemented](https://fathom.video/share/zxw4SysmEtCRvVQ5yr-Zy6jkReaphMC4?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
